choose.when: ORDER BY DECODE(a.library_code,'9999999',1,99) ASC, a.${sortField} ${sortType} NULLS LAST, a.book_idx DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY DECODE(a.library_code,'9999999',1,99) ASC, a.book_idx DESC NULLS LAST, a.book_name

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a WHERE 1=1

SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, a.book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name, (SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, a.device, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a, ELIB_HOPE_BOOKINFO d, CMS_HOMEPAGE e WHERE 1=1 AND a.book_idx = d.book_idx AND a.library_code = e.homepage_code

${pagingTop} SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS add_date, a.book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, a.device, ec.cate_name AS cate_name, a.application_status, a.application_add_date, a.application_user_name, a.application_user_id, a.application_user_no, (SELECT b.book_info FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOKINFO b WHERE b.book_code = a.book_code AND ROWNUM = 1) AS book_info, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, ep.cate_name AS parent_name, cmp.comp_name AS comp_name, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a JOIN CMS_HOMEPAGE e ON a.library_code = SUBSTR(e.homepage_code, 1, 8) LEFT JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY ec ON ec.cate_id = a.cate_id LEFT JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY ep ON ep.cate_id = a.parent_id LEFT JOIN ELIB_COMPANY cmp ON cmp.com_code = a.com_code WHERE a.use_yn != 'N' AND a.type = #{type}
${pagingBottom}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a WHERE a.use_yn != 'N'
AND a.type = #{type}

${pagingTop} SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS add_date, a.book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, a.device, ec.cate_name AS cate_name, a.application_status, a.application_add_date, a.application_user_name, a.application_user_id, a.application_user_no, a.application_cell_phone, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, ep.cate_name AS parent_name, cmp.comp_name AS comp_name, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a JOIN CMS_HOMEPAGE e ON a.library_code = SUBSTR(e.homepage_code, 1, 8) LEFT JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY ec ON ec.cate_id = a.cate_id LEFT JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY ep ON ep.cate_id = a.parent_id LEFT JOIN ELIB_COMPANY cmp ON cmp.com_code = a.com_code WHERE a.type = #{type}
${pagingBottom}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a WHERE 1=1
AND a.type = #{type}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_COURSE WHERE lesson_name = #{lesson_name} AND lesson_no = #{lesson_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_AUDIOBOOK WHERE audio_name = #{audio_name} AND audio_no = #{audio_no}
SELECT course_idx FROM ELIB_HOPE_COURSE WHERE lesson_name = #{lesson_name} AND lesson_no = #{lesson_no}
SELECT audio_idx FROM ELIB_HOPE_AUDIOBOOK WHERE audio_name = #{audio_name} AND audio_no = #{audio_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT WHERE application_user_no = #{application_user_no} AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a JOIN ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT eh ON eh.book_idx = a.book_idx WHERE eh.application_status IS NOT NULL AND eh.application_user_id = #{application_user_id}

${pagingTop} SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS add_date, a.book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, a.device, ec.cate_name AS cate_name, eh.application_status, eh.application_add_date, eh.application_user_name, eh.application_user_id, eh.application_user_no, eh.application_cell_phone, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, ep.cate_name AS parent_name, cmp.comp_name AS comp_name, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a JOIN CMS_HOMEPAGE e ON a.library_code = SUBSTR(e.homepage_code, 1, 8) LEFT JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY ec ON ec.cate_id = a.cate_id LEFT JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY ep ON ep.cate_id = a.parent_id LEFT JOIN ELIB_COMPANY cmp ON cmp.com_code = a.com_code LEFT JOIN ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT eh ON eh.book_idx = a.book_idx WHERE eh.application_status IS NOT NULL AND eh.application_user_id = #{application_user_id}
${pagingBottom}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK a WHERE a.use_yn != 'N' AND a.application_status IS NOT NULL
AND UPPER(REPLACE(a.${search_type}, ' ')) LIKE '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(a.APPLICATION_STATUS, ' ')) LIKE '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{application_status}, ' '))||'%'

SELECT ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, APPLICATION_ADD_DATE, APPLICATION_APPROVAL_DATE, APPLICATION_APPROVAL_ID, APPLICATION_CANCEL_DATE, APPLICATION_CANCEL_ID, APPLICATION_REMARKS, APPLICATION_STATUS, APPLICATION_USER_ID, APPLICATION_USER_NAME, APPLICATION_USER_NO, APPROVED_YN, AUTHOR_NAME, BOOK_CODE, BOOK_IDX, BOOK_IMAGE, BOOK_LEND, BOOK_NAME, BOOK_PUBDT, BOOK_PUBNAME, BOOK_REGDT, BOOK_RESERVE, CATE_ID, COM_CODE, DEVICE, FORMAT, ISBN13, LEND_TOTAL, LIBRARY_CODE, MAX_LEND, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, PARENT_ID, RECOMMEND_CNT, TYPE, USE_YN, APPLICATION_CELL_PHONE FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK WHERE BOOK_IDX = #{book_idx} AND BOOK_CODE = #{book_code}
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_BOOKINFO SET book_code = #{book_code}, book_info = #{book_info}, author_info = #{author_info}, book_table = #{book_table}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_AUDIOBOOK SET link_url = #{link_url}, mobile_link_url = #{mobile_link_url}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_COURSE SET lesson_no = #{lesson_no}, lesson_name = #{lesson_name}, lesson_url = #{lesson_url}, mobile_url = #{mobile_url} WHERE course_idx = #{course_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_BOOK SET approved_yn = 'Y' WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_BOOK SET approved_yn = 'N' WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_BOOK SET approved_yn = 'Y' WHERE approved_yn != 'Y'

UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT SET APPLICATION_STATUS = #{application_status}, APPLICATION_CANCEL_ID = #{application_user_id}, APPLICATION_CANCEL_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOOK_IDX = #{book_idx} AND APPLICATION_USER_ID = #{application_user_id} AND APPLICATION_STATUS = '1' AND APPLICATION_USER_NO = #{application_user_no}

UPDATE ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT SET APPLICATION_STATUS = #{application_status}, APPLICATION_REMARKS = #{application_remarks},
APPLICATION_APPROVAL_ID = #{application_user_id}, APPLICATION_APPROVAL_DATE = SYSDATE
APPLICATION_CANCEL_ID = #{application_user_id}, APPLICATION_CANCEL_DATE = SYSDATE
WHERE BOOK_IDX = #{book_idx} AND APPLICATION_IDX = #{application_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS add_date, TO_CHAR(a.book_regdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, d.book_info, d.author_info, d.book_table, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name, (SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, g.bestbook_idx, h.cat_bestbook_idx, a.device, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_BOOKINFO d, CMS_HOMEPAGE e ,ELIB_BESTBOOK g ,ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK h WHERE a.book_idx = #{book_idx} AND a.book_idx = d.book_idx AND a.book_idx = g.book_idx (+) AND a.book_code = h.book_code (+) AND a.library_code = SUBSTR(e.homepage_code, 1, 8)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT A JOIN ELIB_HOPE_BOOK B ON A.BOOK_IDX = B.BOOK_IDX WHERE B.APPROVED_YN = 'Y'
AND A.application_status = #{application_status}
AND A.application_user_id LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND A.application_user_name LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND B.book_name LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND B.book_pubname LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND B.author_name LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'

SELECT A.application_idx, A.book_idx, A.application_user_no, A.application_user_id, A.application_user_name, A.application_status, A.application_add_date, A.application_cancel_id, A.application_cancel_date, A.application_approval_date, A.application_approval_id, A.application_remarks, B.book_code, B.cate_id, B.book_name, B.author_name, B.book_pubname, B.book_image FROM ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT A JOIN ELIB_HOPE_BOOK B ON A.BOOK_IDX = B.BOOK_IDX WHERE B.APPROVED_YN = 'Y'
AND A.application_status = #{application_status}
AND A.application_user_id LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND A.application_user_name LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND B.book_name LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND B.book_pubname LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND B.author_name LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'

SELECT B.BOOK_IDX, B.BOOK_NAME, B.AUTHOR_NAME, B.BOOK_PUBNAME, COUNT(A.APPLICATION_IDX) AS CNT FROM ELIB_HOPE_BOOK B LEFT JOIN ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT A ON A.BOOK_IDX = B.BOOK_IDX AND A.APPLICATION_STATUS NOT IN ('4','5') WHERE B.APPROVED_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY B.BOOK_IDX, B.BOOK_NAME, B.AUTHOR_NAME, B.BOOK_PUBNAME ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT A.application_idx, A.book_idx, A.application_user_no, A.application_user_id, A.application_user_name, A.application_status, A.application_add_date, A.application_cancel_id, A.application_cancel_date, A.application_remarks, A.application_cell_phone, B.book_name FROM ELIB_HOPE_APPLICANT A LEFT JOIN ELIB_HOPE_BOOK B ON A.BOOK_IDX = B.BOOK_IDX WHERE application_idx = #{application_idx}
